tasks.label: rewrite-editor-ui-imports
args: const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=path.join(process.cwd(),'components','editor');let files=0,changes=0,repls=0;const walk=d=>{for(const ent of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,ent.name);if(ent.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(ent.name)){files++;const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');const n=(s.match(/@\/components\/ui\//g)||[]).length;if(n){const out=s.split('@/components/ui/').join('@/components/editor/ui/');fs.writeFileSync(p,out);changes++;repls+=n;}}}};walk(root);console.log('FILES='+files);console.log('CHANGED='+changes);console.log('REPLACED='+repls);
